mapper.sql: select schedule_id, guide_id, group_id, assign_time, start_time, end_time, load_count, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from guide_schedule
mapper.insert:
insert into guide_schedule
guide_id, group_id, assign_time, start_time, end_time, load_count, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag,
#{guideId}, #{groupId}, #{assignTime}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{loadCount}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag},
mapper.delete:
delete from guide_schedule where schedule_id in
#{scheduleId}
mapper.select: SELECT tg.group_code AS groupCode, tg.tourist_count AS touristCount, tg.language_preference AS languagePreference, mp.point_name AS meetingPointName, gs.start_time AS expectedStartTime, tr.route_name AS routeName, gs.status AS status FROM guide_schedule gs LEFT JOIN tourist_group tg ON gs.group_id = tg.group_id LEFT JOIN meeting_point mp ON tg.point_id = mp.point_id LEFT JOIN tour_route tr ON tg.route_id = tr.route_id WHERE gs.guide_id = #{guideId} AND gs.del_flag = '0' AND DATE(gs.start_time) = CURDATE() ORDER BY gs.start_time ASC

SELECT tg.group_code AS groupCode, tg.tourist_count AS touristCount, tg.language_preference AS languagePreference, mp.point_name AS meetingPointName, gs.start_time AS expectedStartTime, tr.route_name AS routeName, gs.status AS status FROM guide_schedule gs LEFT JOIN tourist_group tg ON gs.group_id = tg.group_id LEFT JOIN meeting_point mp ON tg.point_id = mp.point_id LEFT JOIN tour_route tr ON tg.route_id = tr.route_id WHERE gs.guide_id = #{guideId} AND gs.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY gs.start_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE guide_schedule gs INNER JOIN tourist_group tg ON gs.group_id = tg.group_id SET gs.status = '1' WHERE gs.guide_id = #{guideId} AND tg.group_code = #{groupCode} AND gs.del_flag = '0' AND gs.status = '0' AND DATE(gs.start_time) = CURDATE()
